diagrams.title: Virtual Memory Address Translation
diagrams.description: Shows how virtual address is translated to physical address using page table and MMU
diagrams.purpose: Understand the complete address translation process in paging systems

diagrams.title: Page Replacement Flowchart
diagrams.description: Decision flow when a page fault occurs and all frames are occupied
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the complete page fault handling and replacement process

diagrams.title: Memory Management Techniques Comparison
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of different memory allocation strategies
diagrams.purpose: Understand differences between memory management approaches
